title: 毎日王冠の後に・その名は

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a fierce and heated race, Grass Wonder
comes out on top!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Victory is hers, but she can't find the words to
describe the feeling. All she can do is bask in the
afterglow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now she looks ahead to her second, more
focused shot at the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week, who was spectating today's race, is
left speechless by her friends' ever-growing
abilities. As she stares on in shock, Maruzensky
approaches her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Prompted by Maruzensky's words, Special Week
breaks through her complex feelings and runs off,
inspiration rekindled.
